description_long: This nightstand features a tall, rectangular cabinet with a single front-facing door and a drawer beneath it. The exterior is finished in a dark wood tone, giving it a classic and understated appearance suitable for both modern and traditional settings. The legs are distinctively shaped, with a turned, sculpted design that adds a touch of elegance and visual interest. The front door is flat and unadorned, with a subtle handle on the left side, while the drawer below has a small, integrated pull. The sides and back are plain, emphasizing the functional, storage-oriented design. This piece is likely constructed from wood, with metal hardware for the hinges and handles, and is designed to be placed beside a bed or against a wall in an urban living space.
description: A tall, dark wood nightstand with a single door, one drawer, and sculpted legs. The design is simple yet elegant, with minimal hardware and a classic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the door, drawer, and sculpted legs, with the handle visible on the left side of the door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, unadorned side panel and the profile of the sculpted legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, featureless back panel and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another plain side panel and the right profile of the legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
